testcase.name: test_cv_upload_endpoint_exists
testcase.failure: tests/test_onboarding.py:313: in test_cv_upload_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code in [400, 422], f"Expected 400/422, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400/422, got 405: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 in [400, 422] E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cv_upload_with_test_file
testcase.failure: tests/test_onboarding.py:326: in test_cv_upload_with_test_file assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 405: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code
